calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-14-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an Adult and of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Valeriya Nikolayevna Ledukhovskaya was present in pro per for herself, and as Guardian ad litem for the minor, Filip S. Ledukhovskiy.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Order Dispensing with Notice of today's hearing to the minor's presumed/biological father was filed today, May 14, 2009.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Valeria Nicole Leduhousky.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Philip Gregory Leduhovsky.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
